name: BEAZER HOMES USA INC
summary: PART I Beazer Homes is a nationally recognized homebuilder committed to building homes and communities designed with the intention of inspiring sustainable and healthier living. With personalized options and expert guidance, we empower homebuyers with competitive mortgage choices and energy saving features that make homeownership more attainable.
